texto: People say when something stops growing, it dies; I don't think it's the same with love. Even when love stops growing because there's nothing to nurtures it, it doesn't die; it just stays somewhere in a limbo.
explicacao: Citação de Tayo Emmanuel sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “People say when something stops growing, it dies; I don't think it's the same with love. Even whe…” articula reflexao, love-hurts, stops em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
